name: Spinach Salad with Honey Mustard Poppy Seed Dressing
recipeInstructions:
STEP ONE: Prepare the Mayonnaise--
Whip 5 egg yolks with 1 tablespoon red wine vinegar and juice of one lemon until frothy. Slowly add the 3/4 quart salad oil and 1 tablespoon boiling water while constantly whipping the mixture.
STEP TWO: Preparing the Dressing--
Take 3/4 quart mayonnaise made, and stir in types of mustard (Dijon and yellow), cup honey (adjust to taste), tarragon, dash red wine vinegar, juice of one lemon, poppy seeds, salt, and black pepper to taste. Stir until thoroughly blended.
STEP THREE: Prepare the Salad--
Serve over a bed of torn spinach.
SUGGESTED GARNISHES:
Crumbled cooked bacon
Crumbled hard boiled eggs
Sections of Mandarin oranges
Bean sprouts
